EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ILongitudeRotationTransformation

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control the parameters of a longitude-rotation transformation.

[Guid("64C7C780-DA8B-11D3-9F60-00C04F6BDD7F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ILongitudeRotationTransformation : IGeoTransformation, ITransformation

Properties

Name 

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Rotation

Counterclockwise (looking down on North Pole) positive rotation about Earth's rotational axis.

double Rotation { get; }

Property Value

double
